verdict_hint: MIXED: at least one feature baseline closes much of the exponent gap or no exponent baseline
note: Single-L, raw multi-L, cross-L engineered, and PCA-whitened feature baselines use identical seed subsets. Matched exponent geometry is recomputed from the same seed subsets, but it is still a hand-built scaling representation. These baselines test specific feature-side uses of multi-L information, not every possible learned representation.
